debug:
PASS face_preserved: Clock face preserved
PASS two_hands: Both clock hands present
FAIL hands_anchored_at_center: A hand's base end drifted more than 30px off the clock center — hands must stay attached to the pivot. (Note: the rotate handle pivots a hand about its own middle, which detaches its base.)
PASS hour_points_to_4: Hour hand points to the 4
PASS minute_points_to_12: Minute hand points to the 12 (North)

hands_anchored_at_center.message: A hand's base end drifted more than 30px off the clock center — hands must stay attached to the pivot. (Note: the rotate handle pivots a hand about its own middle, which detaches its base.)
